headline: A Look At Campbell’s (CPB) Valuation As Earnings Concerns And Segment Pressures Intensify
summary: Campbell's (CPB) heads into its Q2 2026 earnings release under pressure, with Wall Street focused on expected earnings and revenue declines, weaker performance in key segments, and growing caution among professional investors. See our latest analysis for Campbell's. At a share price of $24.68, Campbell's has come under sustained pressure, with a 30 day share price return of 14.39% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of 35.11% decline, as investors weigh softer 2026 earnings...

headline: Stocks to Watch Wednesday: Oracle, Rheinmetall, Campbell's
summary: ↗️Oracle (ORCL): The cloud-computing company raised its sales outlook as demand for artificial intelligence continues to outpace supply. Shares rallied 10% premarket. ↘️Rheinmetall (XE:RHM): The German arms maker's earnings fell short of expectations, sending shares down 5%.

headline: Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) Misses Q4 CY2025 Sales Expectations, Stock Drops
summary: Packaged food company Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales falling 4.5% year on year to $2.56 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.51 per share was 10.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Campbell's stock sinks on lowered outlook. Are consumers OK?
summary: Campbell's (CPB) stock is sinking after the company reported weak second quarter sales and lowered its 2026 guidance. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma join Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi to discuss the earnings print, highlighting the consumer impact of current geopolitical tensions. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

headline: Campbell’s Stock Hit by Snacks Slump
